Create src/main/kotlin/com/dndweapons/codegen/wiki/WikiTemplates.kt

Enum mappings (Property, RangeKind, Tier, DamageType, Category) MUST match the actual enum variants in src/main/kotlin/com/dndweapons/catalog/. Notably: Property.SPECIAL does NOT exist; the actual variant is Property.SPECIAL_LANCE. RangeKind has additional variants SLING and BLOWGUN that must be mapped. Do not invent variants -- inspect the source.
